secrets_vault: Vercel environment variables plus GitHub Actions secrets where CI needs them

iac.stripe_dashboard: Manual operator setup until billing infrastructure automation is added

alerts.name: stripe_webhook_failures
alerts.slo: less than 1 percent failed Stripe webhook deliveries over 15 minutes

alerts.name: billing_checkout_error_rate
alerts.slo: less than 2 percent 5xx on /api/billing/checkout over 15 minutes

alerts.name: billing_portal_error_rate
alerts.slo: less than 2 percent 5xx on /api/billing/portal over 15 minutes

rollback.strategy: Rollback the deployment and keep Stripe webhook routing pointed at the last healthy environment.
